creator: xwiki

evidence.text: The XWiki platform # XWiki Platform [XWiki Platform](https://www.xwiki.org/xwiki/bin/view/Documentation/) is a generic wiki platform offering runtime services for applications built on top of it. XWiki Commons, XWiki Rendering, and XWiki Platform are part of the [XWiki.org](http://www.xwiki.org/) software forge. They are released together and share the same version. ## Documentation * [API](https://www.xwiki.org/xwiki/bin/view/Documentation/DevGuide/API/) * [Development Zone](https://dev.xwiki.org/xwiki/bin/view/Community/) * Guides: * [Developer Guide](https://www.xwiki.org/xwiki/bin/view/Documentation/DevGuide/) * [Administrator Guide](https://www.xwiki.org/xwiki/bin/vi
